javax::microedition::io::ConnectionNotFoundException Class Reference

Inheritance diagram for javax::microedition::io::ConnectionNotFoundException:

Public Member Functions

 ConnectionNotFoundException ()
 ConnectionNotFoundException (String message)

Detailed Description

This exceptions represents errors due to a connection target which cannot be found, or an unsupported protocol type.
